edge_hypothesis: RSI pullback in a confirmed trend captures 'buy the dip' opportunities that ema_rsi_atr misses entirely. ema_rsi_atr requires RSI to be in a 40-70 band continuously — it fires on RSI being within normal range alongside EMA alignment. rsi_pullback inverts this: it WAITS for RSI to drop below 40 (oversold) while price remains above EMA_200 and EMA_50 slope is rising. This patience-based entry only fires when a strong trend temporarily pulls back to a discount. The edge: buying temporary weakness in a structurally strong trend gives an asymmetric risk/reward because the trend bias acts as a tailwind for recovery. Crypto trends are persistent — pullbacks in established trends tend to recover quickly.
regime_assumption: Trending regime (ADX > 20) with established directional move. EMA_200 acts as the structural trend filter. Invalidates when trend breaks (price crosses EMA_200) or when pullback is actually a reversal (EMA_50 slope turns). Different from ema_rsi_atr: this template requires BOTH a confirmed trend AND a pullback, not just trend + RSI in range.

variants.name: rsi_pullback_deep_dip
variants.description: Deep pullback entry: RSI < 35 in an established uptrend (close > EMA_200, EMA_50 slope up). Fewer trades but higher conviction — only enters when the pullback is genuinely deep. ETH/1h for manageable drawdown.
entry_long: Require close > EMA_200 to confirm structural uptrend.
Require EMA_50 slope positive (current > prior bar).
Require RSI_14 < 35 (deep oversold pullback in uptrend).
entry_short: Require close < EMA_200 to confirm structural downtrend.
Require EMA_50 slope negative (current < prior bar).
Require RSI_14 > 65 (deep overbought pullback in downtrend).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Regime gate: ADX_14 > 20 (trending), EMA_200 as structural trend filter
Pullback depth: RSI < 35 for longs, RSI > 65 for shorts (deeper than default 40/60)
exit_rules: Exit on RSI_14 returning to 50 (neutral — pullback recovery complete).
Exit on close crossing below EMA_200 (trend invalidation for longs).
Exit on EMA_50 slope reversal (momentum shift).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (15 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Pullback becomes reversal through EMA_200
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Extended consolidation at pullback level (no recovery)
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 from entry (moderate — pullback gives natural stop level).
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (1.67:1 R:R).
Trend invalidation: exit immediately if close < EMA_200 regardless of P&L.

components.notes: EMA_200 structural trend + EMA_50 slope as momentum confirmation
RSI_14 < 35 deep oversold pullback entry trigger

variants.name: rsi_pullback_standard
variants.description: Standard pullback depth: RSI < 40 (template default) with EMA_200 trend and EMA_50 slope. More trade frequency than deep_dip variant. Tests whether standard pullback depth has edge with proper trend confirmation.
entry_long: Require close > EMA_200 to confirm structural uptrend.
Require EMA_50 slope positive (current > prior bar).
entry_short: Require close < EMA_200 to confirm structural downtrend.
Require EMA_50 slope negative (current < prior bar).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Regime gate: close > EMA_200 (structural uptrend) + EMA_50 slope positive
exit_rules: Exit on RSI_14 returning to 50 (pullback recovery complete).
Exit on close crossing below EMA_200 (trend invalidation for longs).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (12 bars on 4h = 48 hours).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Pullback becomes reversal
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Extended sideways consolidation near pullback low
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry (wider for 4h timeframe).
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry (1.5:1 R:R).
Trend invalidation: exit immediately if close < EMA_200.

components.notes: EMA_200 structural trend + EMA_50 slope confirmation

variants.name: rsi_pullback_exit_optimized
variants.description: Combines rsi_pullback entry with exit_change insight from PF 1.033 outcome. Uses wider stops (2.5x ATR) and extended TP (3.5x ATR) to avoid premature stop-outs during the recovery phase of pullbacks. Tests whether the winning exit profile amplifies the pullback entry edge.
entry_long: Require close > EMA_200 to confirm structural uptrend.
Require EMA_50 slope positive (current > prior bar).
entry_short: Require close < EMA_200 to confirm structural downtrend.
Require EMA_50 slope negative (current < prior bar).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Exit optimization: derived from PF 1.033 exit_change insight — wider stops avoid premature stop-outs
exit_rules: Exit on RSI_14 returning to 55 (full recovery past neutral).
Exit on close crossing below EMA_200 (trend invalidation for longs).
Exit on max bars in trade threshold (18 bars).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Wide stop allows excessive adverse excursion on pullback-to-reversal
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Pullback recovery stalls at resistance level
risk_rules: Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry (wide — avoid premature stop-out during pullback volatility).
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry (1.4:1 R:R — let trend carry).
Exit optimization: wider stops proved critical for the PF 1.033 outcome.

components.notes: EMA_200 structural trend + EMA_50 slope confirmation
ATR_14 for exit-optimized wide stop/TP sizing
